name: com.brassworks.sidecar.surface-breakup-decal-set12
displayName: Brassworks Breach Surface Breakup Decal Set 12
description: Unity-only visual sidecar bundle of transparent quad decals and PNG alpha/mask maps for steampunk corridor grime, wetness, light stains, edge wear, chips, scuffs, corner darkness, and rivet rust halos. Contains no gameplay scripts, colliders, lights, scenes, custom shaders, Blender files, or external DCC output.
